rulings.Case Title: HOTEL ASTORIA INC. VS. TUDURY TRUST ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of And Motion To Reconsider Orders Of March 9, 2015.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 18, 2015 line 2. PLAINTIFF HOTEL ASTORIA INC.'s Motion To Reconsider Orders Of March 9, 2015. shall be heard by the honorable Charles Haines. Parties are ordered to contact Department 505 at (415) 551-3796 to coordinate a new hearing date. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers to department 501 no later than May 18, 2015 with a cover letter indicating that the matter is to be heard by the honorable Charles Haines. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: INFRANTA Y LO VS. PAUL ENGLISH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-14-541328 WITH CASE CUD-14-650136
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 18, 2015 line 4. PLAINTIFF INFRANTA LO's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-14-541328 WITH CASE CUD-14-650136 GRANTED. Cases are consolidated for all purposes. CGC-14-541210 shall be the lead case. State Farm Mut. Ins. Co. v. Sup. Ct. (1956) 47 Cal.2d 428 is not applicable. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA VS. GOLDROCK GROUP LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, May 18, 2015 line 9. DEFENDANT GOLDROCK GROUP LLC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, answer to be filed forthwith.
